title: Welcome to the warren
body: Every worker is a creature, and food is the power grid. Right-drag or WASD to look around; scroll to zoom.

title: Grow the Food Grid
body: Top-left: Production vs Upkeep — keep the net positive. Open Build & Dig, pick a Farm, and place it on open floor near your Cook Pot. Carriers haul the ore to build it.

title: The Mine runs itself
body: A goblin already works the Ore Mine beside the warren, extracting ore into a buffer that carriers haul to the stockpile — the first live automation loop. Click the Mine to watch its rate.

title: Forge the first ingots
body: Ore becomes ingots at the Blacksmith. Place one, then set a Smith in the Jobs panel — the anvil hammers ore into the metal that crafts gear and wins the factory.

title: Weather the famine
body: The first famine hits within a few minutes. Shift Miners into Carriers in the Jobs panel and push Production above Upkeep — hungry workers slow the whole warren.

title: Close the loop
body: Click the Blacksmith and queue an Iron Pickaxe. A miner picks it up on its own and the Mine speeds up — extraction feeding processing feeding extraction. That is the factory.

title: Awaken the Worm
body: Deliver 50 ore and hold a 100-food surplus to secure the warren. Then forge 20 ingots, raise the Worm Shrine, and feed the Colossal Worm sleeping below.
